title: Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
description: Foundational knowledge of cloud concepts, core Azure services, security, privacy, compliance, and trust.

title: Microsoft Certified: Azure Developer Associate (AZ-204)
description: Proven skills in designing, building, testing, and maintaining cloud applications and services on Microsoft Azure.

title: Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900)
description: Demonstrated foundational knowledge of core data concepts and how they are implemented using Microsoft Azure data services.

title: Microsoft Certified: Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals (SC-900)
description: Validated understanding of security, compliance, and identity concepts and related cloud-based Microsoft services.

title: Generative & Prompt Engineering Fundamentals
description: Completed an internal certification program focused on generative AI workflows, prompt engineering, and effective use of AI in product development.

title: Insta Award for Cloud Excellence
description: Recognized for outstanding technical leadership and delivering critical cloud transformation milestones ahead of schedule.

title: Unsung Hero Award for Mentorship
description: Awarded for consistent mentorship and enabling the professional growth of engineers through coaching, knowledge-sharing sessions, and hands-on guidance.
